{{Quote|Sir, we're picking up a general alert on the secondary net. The relay at Mengjini has allegedly come under attack from a small group of, quote, dissident elements, unquote.|A communication officer to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]|<ref name="Specter" />}}
The '''Battle of Mengjini''' was one of the crises that faced the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].

==History==
{{Quote|Not good. When they start messing with long-range communications, you know they're getting serious.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="Specter" />}}
In it, 'dissident elements' under the [[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]] organization attacked the New Republic [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] node at [[Mengjini]]. A task force under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], just having defeated the [[Blockade of Sif'kric]], was sent to repel the attack on the node, along with additional New Republic forces in the area.

{{Battle-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
